name: jetder-mcp
description: Deploy apps and manage domains on Jetder from your AI agent — 62 tools, 3 prompts, 3 resources.
long_description: An MCP server that exposes the Jetder API (deployments, projects, secrets, …) and Cloudflare (DNS + buying domains) to an AI agent. After installing, enter your Jetder service-account email and API token when prompted. Get access at https://thunder.in.th/

jetder_user.title: Jetder service-account email
jetder_user.description: Your Jetder service-account email (the Basic-auth username), e.g. ai-dev@<project>.serviceaccount.jetder.com. No access yet? Get one at https://thunder.in.th/

jetder_token.title: Jetder API token
jetder_token.description: Your Jetder API token (the Basic-auth password). Stored securely.
